name: BBE Bloodwork
purpose: Show the current equity signal read: Demand Power, Perceived Value, Salient, Meaningful, Different, typology, benchmarks, and momentum.
questions: What is my strongest equity signal?

name: Root Cause Map
purpose: Connect Demand Power to Salient/Meaningful and Perceived Value to Meaningful/Different with diagnostic language while preserving Pricing Power as the source metric name.
questions: Which metric is symptom vs cause?

name: BrandZ Typology Map
purpose: Show what kind of brand this is and what typical jobs/treatments fit that profile.
questions: Is this condition typical for this typology?

name: Growth Navigator Bridge
purpose: Show whether equity is converting through Proposition, Reach, Resonance, Available & Visible, and Delivering Value.
questions: Is this a brand problem or conversion problem?

name: Treatment Pathway
purpose: Show the foundation-first prescription ladder and tradeoffs.
questions: What is the fastest useful action?
